title: Why Bevel Is a Way Better App for the Fitbit Air Than Google Health
summary: That means you can wear your Fitbit Air, ignore its native app (Google Health), and instead browse your health data and track your workouts through Bevel. This will let Bevel pull in data from Google Health, which gets it from Fitbit Air.
